commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=215bafe1276b35da2dd0cb4e8892cb8c34be4934)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes the Codex native PostToolUse relay to run active Codex agentToolResultMiddleware registrations and return rewritten middleware text through Codex hook feedback.

PR surface: Source +103, Tests +118. Total +221 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: the patched relay returns exit code 2 for rewritten middleware output, while upstream Codex treats PostToolUse exit code 2 as a blocked result. I did not run live Codex/Tokenjuice proof during this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A narrow automated repair can update the PR branch to use the correct Codex PostToolUse response contract and adjust the focused tests.

target.title: [codex] Run Codex native post-tool middleware
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #95597.

Codex native `PostToolUse` relay only treated `after_tool_call` hooks as local post-tool work, so loaded Codex tool-result middleware such as Tokenjuice could be skipped for native Codex tool completions.

## Why This Change Was Made

The native Codex relay now treats active Codex `agentToolResultMiddleware` registrations as post-tool work. For native `PostToolUse`, the relay gives middleware an OpenClaw-shaped view of Codex's stable `tool_response` payload.

When middleware returns rewritten text, the relay maps that result onto Codex's supported `PostToolUse` feedback path: exit code 2 with feedback on stderr. Codex records that feedback as the model-visible replacement output, which keeps Tokenjuice-style compaction effective without adding broader plugin-loader ownership changes. Existing `after_tool_call` observers still receive the raw native hook payload.

Codex contract checked:

- `../codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/registry.rs:573-625`
- `../codex/codex-rs/hooks/src/events/post_tool_use.rs:190-272`
- `../codex/codex-rs/core/src/hook_runtime.rs:257-285`

## User Impact

Tokenjuice and other loaded Codex tool-result middleware can observe native Codex tool results and replace model-visible command output again without requiring unrelated `after_tool_call` hooks.

## Evidence

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/harness/native-hook-relay.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
- One autoreview round found that the first trimmed patch discarded middleware results; this revision captures returned middleware output and maps changed text to Codex feedback. Per draft-PR guardrails, I did not run another autoreview loop.

### Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Native Codex `PostToolUse` now runs active Codex tool-result middleware and returns changed middleware text through Codex's feedback replacement path.

Real environment tested: Local Codex worktree, rebased onto current `origin/main`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/harness/native-hook-relay.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo`; `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo`; `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`.

Evidence after fix: Focused native relay Vitest passed with 78 tests, including coverage for active middleware relay registration, middleware event/context coercion, unchanged middleware no-op, and rewritten middleware output returning `{ stdout: "", stderr: "compacted output\n", exitCode: 2 }`.

Observed result after fix: The native Codex relay preserves no-op output for unchanged middleware results and returns Codex feedback only when middleware changes model-visible text.

What was not tested: Live Tokenjuice artifact/compaction in a real Codex agent turn; draft PR CI is pending.
target.author: monkeyleet
